last_completed_round.direction_name: Phased 64x384 micro-panels to shrink the live set
last_completed_round.hypothesis: Keep the autotune-selected 64x384 outer CTA, but stop carrying the full 12-wide B and accumulator live set through the hot loop. The latest regressed run still sits at 126 registers/thread, occupancy limit 2, and only 32.95% active warps with tensor active down at 28.22%, so the best next move on the restored accepted base is to serialize the 384-wide work into smaller internal micro-panels such as 2x192 or 3x128 while preserving the 384-wide CTA-count advantage.

notes: Build passed for round 3/5. Node A will measure the result next.
